name: Blight Donatello
description:
Picture credits:bluebloodbearer and aestheticcultist on instagram

Blight had nothing, not a penny to his name. That is why when he signed up to be a knight for the royal lineage who was thrilled to surpass his comrades. Excelling through the ranks, he thought he would be leading great battles. That is until he is partnered to protect the princess. That was never his goal, and he made sure to make that clear.
creator: Your mom. 63
